description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring three horizontal wooden slats forming the backrest and three wider wooden slats making up the seat. The wood is a rich, dark brown, and the bench is supported by two robust, black metal legs with a slightly flared base for stability. The metal supports are bolted to the wood with visible silver fasteners, giving the bench a secure and durable appearance. The design is simple yet functional, with no armrests and a straight, supportive backrest. The bench is likely intended for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or bus stops, offering comfortable seating for multiple people. Its materials and construction suggest it is built to withstand outdoor weather conditions.
description: A dark brown wooden bench with a straight backrest and black metal legs, designed for outdoor public use. The bench is sturdy, functional, and lacks armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three horizontal backrest slats, wide seat, and sturdy black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden slats and the depth of the seat, with the backrest visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the full structure of the metal supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_design: two wide black metal supports with flared bases
